title: Phone Enricher Input
description: Enrich a list of businesses with phone numbers via cascade lookup (website → GMaps → Google Search).

records.title: Records
records.description: Array of business records. Each record needs at least one of: businessName, website, or email.

businessName.description: Business name for GMaps and Google Search lookup

website.description: Business website URL for direct scraping

email.description: Business email (preserved in output, not used for lookup)
